parameters.query:
WITH rate AS (
  SELECT exchange_rate, ROUND(1.0/exchange_rate, 2) as rub_per_eur
  FROM currency WHERE code = 'RUB'
),
orders AS (
  SELECT
    mo.id,
    (mo.content->>'total')::numeric / 100 as total_eur,
    mo.content->'items'->0->>'brand' as brand,
    mo.content->'items'->0->>'title' as title,
    mo.external_order_id,
    mo.status
  FROM marketplace_order mo
  WHERE mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
    AND DATE(mo.updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN brand = 'Nutaku' THEN 'Nutaku' ELSE 'Other' END as segment,
  COUNT(*) as orders,
  ROUND(SUM(total_eur), 2) as revenue_eur,
  ROUND(SUM(total_eur / r.exchange_rate), 0) as revenue_rub,
  r.rub_per_eur as rate
FROM orders, rate r
GROUP BY 1, r.rub_per_eur, r.exchange_rate
ORDER BY 1
